payment_modes: Demand Draft (favour of 'The Secretary, TNEA' payable at Chennai)

concessions.name: 7.5% Government School Quota Fee Waiver
concessions.description: Counselling, tuition, and hostel fees fully waived for students admitted under the 7.5% reservation for government school students (G.O. 221, Higher Education J2, dated 15.11.2021).
eligibility: Studied 6th to 12th standard in a government, corporation, municipal, Adi Dravidar & Tribal Welfare, Kallar Reclamation, or Forest Department school
Submit proof of school study from 6th to 12th standard

concessions.name: First Graduate Tuition Fee Concession
concessions.description: Tuition fee concession for candidates who will be the first graduate in their family (G.O. 85, Higher Education J2, dated 16.04.2010).
eligibility: First graduate in the family (no brother or sister has availed this concession before)
Certificate from Head Quarters Deputy Tahsildar in the prescribed G.O. format (electronic / digitally signed e-Certificate)
Joint declaration by candidate and parent or guardian
concessions.benefit: Full tuition fee concession during the B.Arch programme

concessions.name: Post-Matric Scholarship (PMSS)
concessions.description: Post-Matric Scholarship for SC, SCA, ST candidates and SC/SCA converted Christians whose parental annual income is below Rs.2,50,000.
eligibility: SC / SCA / ST candidate, or SC/SCA converted Christian
Parental annual income less than Rs.2,50,000 from all sources
concessions.benefit: Scholarship paid through the college after admission

govt_school_categories: Adi Dravida and Tribal Welfare Schools
